archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for High-End Clinical Noir

hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-400 text-left

layout.strategy: Asymmetric Bento Grid (Control Room Mode) with generous p-8/p-12 spacing. Left-aligned typography across dense areas.

surface_styles.cards: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-colors

components.buttons: rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-[0.98] bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white
components.inputs: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm text-white
components.calendar: Use Shadcn Calendar. Override styles to ensure dark mode matches slate-900 surface. Provide ample padding inside the component.
components.time_slots: Hourly grid 9:00 to 17:00. Use radio-group or toggle-group styled as sharp rectangular buttons.
components.toast: Use Sonner for success and error toast notifications. Ensure high contrast.

image_urls.description: Abstract microscopic view for login background texture. Must be heavily overlaid with bg-slate-950/90 to keep it subtle.

motion.page_transitions: Framer motion, slight fade and translateY(10px) on load
motion.hover_states: Cards subtly glow or border brightens to blue-500/50. Interactive states must clearly show a lighter hue for hover.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements must have kebab-case data-testid (e.g., login-form-submit-button, doctor-select-dropdown, time-slot-button, book-appointment-submit)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme. Do not use generic Inter font. Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
For the dashboard, use the Control Room bento grid layout. Avoid generic center-aligned blocks.
Implement time slots exactly as hourly boundaries (9:00-10:00, 10:00-11:00... 16:00-17:00).
Seed 20-30 doctors with specialties (Cardiologist, Dermatologist, Neurologist, etc.).
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize to remove the 'Vercel' look: use sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm), heavy p-8 padding on cards, and 1px border lines.
Prevent double-booking on the backend and show toast notifications (success/error) on the frontend using Sonner.
Ensure the appointment booking form is clearly separated into 'Select Doctor', 'Select Date', and 'Select Time Slot' steps or sections within the bento grid.
